description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU Documentation that runs on pull requests and pushes to the main branch, and can be triggered manually. The workflow should run on a linux.2xlarge environment with an amazonlinux:2023 container, and perform a series of setup and build steps for FBGEMM_GPU documentation, including setting up Miniconda, installing build tools and compilers, and building and deploying the documentation to a gh-pages branch.
